Index.title: ShoppingOT
Index.about_desc: ShoppingOT is a cutting-edge SaaS platform designed to empower merchants to launch, manage, and scale their own digital storefronts seamlessly.
Index.service_1_desc: Instantly deploy dedicated storefronts for each merchant with isolated data.
Index.service_2_desc: Built with Next.js and robust security to guarantee performance and safety.
Index.service_3_desc: Integrated natively with KHQR Bakong for instant local transactions.
Index.contact_desc: Have questions? Reach out to our support team and we'll help you get started.

AdminDashboard.welcome_back: Welcome back, {name}. Here is what's happening with your store today.

AdminSettings.image_uploaded_profile: Image uploaded! Click 'Save Profile' to confirm.
AdminSettings.image_uploaded_store: Logo uploaded! Click 'Save Store Settings' below.
AdminSettings.leave_blank: Leave blank to keep current password
AdminSettings.url_warning: This URL is automatically generated from your store name and cannot be edited manually.
AdminSettings.category_warning: This helps us customize your product templates.
AdminSettings.theme_customizer_desc: Change your store's primary color and visual style.
AdminSettings.setup_store_first: You must set up a store first.
AdminSettings.address_placeholder: Your physical store or return address
AdminSettings.enable_free_delivery: Enable "Buy $... Up To Get Free Delivery"
AdminSettings.upgrade_desc: KHQR automatic payments are only available on Pro and Premium plans. Please upgrade to unlock.
AdminSettings.currency_desc: Choose the default currency for generating your KHQR codes.

AdminCategories.title: Product Categories
AdminCategories.no_categories_desc: Create your first category above to start organizing your products.
AdminCategories.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this category?

AdminProducts.title: Manage Products
AdminProducts.variant_options: Options (Comma separated, e.g. S, M, L)
AdminProducts.no_variants: No variants added. Product will be sold as a single standard item.
AdminProducts.no_products: No products found. Create one to get started.
AdminProducts.setup_store_first: You must set up a store first.

AdminUpgrade.title: Upgrade Your Plan
AdminUpgrade.payment_success_desc: Your store plan has been upgraded.
AdminUpgrade.scan_desc: Open your banking app and scan the KHQR code below.
AdminUpgrade.setup_store_first: You need to setup a store first.

AdminSetup.title: Store Setup
AdminSetup.category_warning: This helps us customize your product templates.
AdminSetup.step1_desc: Tell us about your brand to get your custom URL.
AdminSetup.step2_desc: Set up KHQR to receive payments directly to your bank.
AdminSetup.link_desc: This is the link you will share with your customers.
AdminSetup.free_plan_desc: You are starting on our completely Free plan! Automatic KHQR payments are reserved for Pro merchants, but you can set them up later if you choose to upgrade.
AdminSetup.fill_required: Please fill in your store name and URL.

AdminTheme.title: Theme Customizer
AdminTheme.color_desc: Choose the primary color for buttons and highlights.
AdminTheme.style_desc: Select the overall aesthetic of your store.
AdminTheme.style_default_desc: Modern, soft rounded corners, light shadows.
AdminTheme.style_minimalist_desc: Clean lines, sharp corners, plenty of white space.
AdminTheme.style_neo_desc: Bold black borders, hard shadows, loud design.
